description_long: This is a modern, box-shaped house with a flat roof and a minimalist design. The exterior is clad in vertically grooved gray panels, giving it a sleek, industrial appearance. Large rectangular windows are asymmetrically placed on the front and sides, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The main entryway features a simple gray door, flanked by two wall-mounted lights and a potted plant, adding a touch of greenery. The house is accompanied by a vibrant purple-leaved tree and a smaller white-blossomed shrub, which enhance the urban landscaping. The roof appears to be partially open, revealing some interior partition walls and rooms.
description: A modern, boxy house with a flat roof, gray grooved exterior, large windows, and minimalist landscaping including a purple tree and potted plants.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, two wall lights, a potted plant, and large windows; purple and white trees are visible to the left.
description_view_1: Rear view with a single window and a clear view of the flat roof; purple tree is positioned further from the house.
description_view_2: Side view displaying multiple windows and the open roof, revealing interior partitions; purple tree is behind the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two windows, the potted plant, and both trees visible; entryway is partially visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flush gray door with two wall-mounted lights and a potted plant, no porch or overhang
